response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack experience, deep technical breadth across languages and systems, and a proven track record in distributed systems and open-source contributions, but lacks explicit evidence of building enterprise-scale experimentation or growth platforms, feature-flagging systems, or AI-driven measurement frameworks — core requirements for this role.
strengths: Extensive experience with distributed systems and high-throughput services at Google and Meta.
Strong full-stack proficiency across JavaScript, TypeScript, DLang, C++, and Python with production shipping record.
Demonstrated leadership in open-source tooling and cross-team knowledge sharing via workshops and frameworks.
concerns: No clear evidence of designing or owning experimentation platforms, feature flighting, or guardrail systems.
Lacks explicit mention of metrics infrastructure, statistical analysis, or bias detection in experimentation contexts.
Current role at Google is listed as starting in 2025 (future-dated), raising red flag for resume accuracy.
